Author: Ruby Blaire
Name: The Atelier
Description: An animated luxury editorial wardrobe and creator platform for discovering, publishing, curating, moderating, and applying modded glamour through Aetherweave codes. Commands: /atelier, /atl
Punchline: Wear the look. Share the thread.
Changelog: Removes the automated moderation notice from the publication panel while preserving the existing review workflow.
